title: Upgradeable Spawners
description: Upgrade spawners with items in frames
body:
Upgrade your spawners by placing an item frame anywhere on a spawner and placing the upgrade item into that frame. The upgrade item then gets consumed, emptying the item frame.
Available upgrades:
- Eye of Ender: Entity spawn count (4 Upgrades. Up to 8 entities)
- Heart of the Sea: Decrease maximum spawn delay (4 Upgrades. Down to 10 seconds)
- Daylight Detector: Increase spawner activation range (4 Upgrades. Up to 80 blocks)
- Echo Shard: Decrease spawn range for smaller farms (3 Upgrades. Down to 1 block)
- Nether Star: Disable spawned entity AI (Single upgrade)

Disable the spawner by having a redstone torch placed inside an item frame that's on the spawner. Remove the redstone torch to resume the spawner.
![Spawner disabled by redstone torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EePqeUy1/images/b3b79ee19e71bdbe7ec3692c273a33c0dce96cc2.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
